name: Automated AI Personality Launch 2026
goal: Go live with a single coherent AI persona—look, voice, and behavior—plus automated publishing, safety checks, and room to scale engagement after launch.
description: Playbook v3.0 (comprehensive implementation edition). Target launch: 2026-04-28. Phases: I. Core Identity & Assets · II. The Content Engine · III. Intelligence & Guardrails · IV. Launch & Real-Time Scale

tasks.title: Niche Validation & Logic Mapping
tasks.content:
Phase: I. Core Identity & Assets

Select a niche (e.g., AI Ethics, Virtual Fashion, or 'Solana-Degenerate'). Use Perplexity to find underserved visual aesthetics in that niche. Map the 'Logic Tree' for how the AI responds to praise vs. criticism to ensure personality stability.

Resources:
- https://perplexity.ai

tasks.title: Character Model Training (Ryla.ai)
tasks.content:
Phase: I. Core Identity & Assets

Upload 20-30 reference images to Ryla.ai to create a 'Master Identity.' Unlike 2024 tools, Ryla ensures 100% face-geometry consistency across different outfits and lighting. This serves as the visual 'source of truth' for all future media.

Resources:
- https://ryla.ai

tasks.title: ElevenLabs Voice Architecture
tasks.content:
Phase: I. Core Identity & Assets

Clone a voice using ElevenLabs' Professional Voice Cloning (PVC). Adjust the 'Stability' and 'Style Exaggeration' sliders to create a signature verbal tick or cadence. High stability is better for 'expert' personas; low stability is better for 'chaotic' comedians.

Resources:
- https://elevenlabs.io

tasks.title: System Prompt Engineering
tasks.content:
Phase: I. Core Identity & Assets

Construct a 2,000-word System Instruction for GPT-4o. Use 'Chain of Thought' prompting to force the AI to 'think' about its character motivation before writing any post. Include a 'Knowledge Base' file of the character's unique backstory.

Resources:
- https://openai.com

tasks.title: Autonomous Account Registration
tasks.content:
Phase: I. Core Identity & Assets

Register handles. For Farcaster, use the 'OpenClaw' agent to autonomously fund the FID ($1 USDC/ETH) and set up the profile. This allows the account to be categorized as a 'Verified Agent' rather than a 'Bot,' preventing shadowbans.

Resources:
- https://farcaster.xyz
- https://x.com

tasks.title: n8n Workflow Hub Integration
tasks.content:
Phase: II. The Content Engine

Set up a self-hosted n8n instance. This will be the 'General' that tells other APIs when to move. Create a 'Cron Trigger' that starts the content generation cycle every morning at 6:00 AM.

Resources:
- https://n8n.io

tasks.title: Trend Scraper & Intelligence
tasks.content:
Phase: II. The Content Engine

Connect a 'Perplexity Node' in n8n to scan for daily news in your niche. The AI will ingest these results and decide which 3 topics are worth 'commenting' on today, ensuring relevance to human current events.

Resources:
- https://perplexity.ai/pro

tasks.title: Script-to-Video Pipeline (HeyGen)
tasks.content:
Phase: II. The Content Engine

Automate the flow where GPT-4o writes a 60-second script, sends it to ElevenLabs for audio, then sends both to HeyGen's Streaming API to generate a high-res video with perfect lip-syncing and natural micro-expressions.

Resources:
- https://heygen.com

tasks.title: Multimodal Vision Metadata
tasks.content:
Phase: II. The Content Engine

Before posting, the video is sent to a GPT-Vision node. It 'watches' the video to ensure no glitches occurred and generates context-aware SEO captions and hashtags that actually describe the visual background.

Resources:
- https://platform.openai.com

tasks.title: Enrich Labs Full-Stack Scheduler
tasks.content:
Phase: II. The Content Engine

Use Enrich Labs to manage the final distribution. Enrich's 2026 AI doesn't just 'schedule'; it adjusts the post time dynamically based on when your specific followers are most active on each platform.

Resources:
- https://enrichlabs.ai

tasks.title: Contextual Reply Logic
tasks.content:
Phase: III. Intelligence & Guardrails

Build a workflow that monitors 'Mentions.' The AI will prioritize replies to high-follower accounts or genuine questions, while ignoring low-effort spam or hate. It uses 'Memory' to remember repeat commenters.

tasks.title: Human-in-the-Loop Webhooks
tasks.content:
Phase: III. Intelligence & Guardrails

Configure a Discord bot to ping you with a 'Yes/No' button for any post the AI flags as 'High Risk' (e.g., discussing politics or health). This prevents 99% of potential PR disasters while remaining 90% automated.

Resources:
- https://discord.com

tasks.title: The 'Seed Batch' Production
tasks.content:
Phase: III. Intelligence & Guardrails

Generate 15 pieces of varied content (Reels, long-form 'Casts,' and static images). This creates a 'portfolio' that makes the account look established and trustworthy to new visitors on Day 1.

tasks.title: API Stress Testing
tasks.content:
Phase: III. Intelligence & Guardrails

Run the entire chain end-to-end to check for 'Uncanny Valley' errors (e.g., drifting lips, voice glitches). Verify that the n8n logic can handle API rate limits by implementing 'Wait' nodes between tasks.

tasks.title: Character Guardrail Refinement
tasks.content:
Phase: III. Intelligence & Guardrails

Finalize the 'Moderation Layer.' Use OpenAI's Moderation API to scan generated content for TOS violations. If a post fails, the workflow automatically regenerates a new version without human intervention.

Resources:
- https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/moderation

tasks.title: Shadow Launch & Warm-up
tasks.content:
Phase: IV. Launch & Real-Time Scale

Upload the 'identity' to Linktree and social bios. Have the AI interact (Like/Replying) with 50 niche-relevant accounts to trigger the platform's 'Interest' algorithms.

Resources:
- https://linktr.ee

tasks.title: Automated Teaser Sequence
tasks.content:
Phase: IV. Launch & Real-Time Scale

Deploy a 48-hour 'Glitch' campaign: 30-second videos of the AI 'assembling' itself. This builds curiosity and provides a high-quality visual hook for early engagement.

tasks.title: GO-LIVE: Full Autonomy
tasks.content:
Phase: IV. Launch & Real-Time Scale

Switch n8n to 'Live' mode. The AI begins its 3x daily posting schedule and 24/7 engagement cycle. Monitor the Discord 'Alerts' channel for the first 12 hours.

tasks.title: Sentiment & Strategy Audit
tasks.content:
Phase: IV. Launch & Real-Time Scale

The AI pulls a weekly CSV of its performance data. It 'Self-Critiques' by analyzing which hooks led to the most shares and automatically updates its 'Best Practices' doc for the next week's scripts.

tasks.title: Live-Stream Integration (Sync Labs)
tasks.content:
Phase: IV. Launch & Real-Time Scale

Implement Sync Labs for real-time live-streaming. The AI reads the Twitch/YouTube chat, processes the text via LLM, and streams a 2K resolution talking-head response with less than 500ms latency.

Resources:
- https://synclabs.so
